subcodes.first_line: O Afnan of the Divine Lote-Tree! For some time no tidings from you have reached us, nor any radiance from your horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای افنان سدره منتهی چندیست که بهیچوجه خبری از شما نرسیده و روشنی از افقتان
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
